_meta.notes: Localization scaffold. Phase-9 follow-up — captures the static UI strings of the home page, /world, /play, /character, /daily, /marketplace, /forms/new. The narrator's prose is NOT translated here (it's generated per-turn). Adding a second locale = copying this file to messages/<locale>.json and translating the values. The lib/i18n loader picks the locale via env (defaults to 'en').

home.tagline: A persistent text RPG where every reincarnation form — slime, cursed book, dungeon core — plays as a fundamentally different game. The world remembers what you did.
home.wakeAsPlaceholder: a cursed book · a dragon egg · a lesser slime
home.wakeAsLabel: what do you wake up as?
home.wakeAsHint: free text. leave blank to default to a lesser slime. say "slime" for the typed form; anything else uses the generic shape and the narrator flavors the prose. the location is rolled randomly.
home.footerCC: 10-turn cap. Anonymous session in a signed cookie. CC BY-NC 4.0.
home.linkSignIn: already have an account? sign in

world.title: the world
world.intro: five racial homelands radiate from a central estuary metropolis. two named towns line each spoke. the genre defaults are inverted: the elves are not wise, the dwarves are not stout, the halflings are not peaceful, the orcs are not violent, and the humans are brittle specialists who die young.

daily.title: today's daily
daily.intro: every player on the same UTC date plays the same form in the same place with the same dice. one attempt per day. the leaderboard ranks by outcome (won → capped → dead) and then by turn count.
daily.comeBackTomorrow: come back tomorrow for a fresh challenge.

marketplace.title: marketplace
marketplace.intro: player listings. 7-day expiry. 10% sink fee on every sale — coins drain from the economy at 1/10 of every transaction so coin floods don't accumulate. items are escrowed at list time; cancel returns them.
marketplace.listIntro: post one of your items to the public marketplace. log-in required. the item is escrowed immediately on listing — cancel returns it. 7-day TTL; 10% sink fee on sale. you must enter the qty you currently hold so the server can cross-check.

forms.intro: authorship is open. the more your form leans into a particular way of not being a person — vocabulary you cannot use, verbs only this thing would do — the more interesting it plays. submissions land in a review queue; expect 1-3 days for admin review.

character.title: your character
character.subtitle: Across all your reincarnations. Each death, win, or cap changed something. Some changed nothing the world noticed — some changed enough to be written down.
